raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.5": 2,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the core concept of finite-precision analysis of a power iteration but doesn't fully articulate how the draft drifts from it or propose a tighter framing.",
    "R1.5": "The agent suggests minor reordering, but doesn't provide a coherent end-to-end plan with rationale for each section.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for some claims but doesn't explicitly mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The agent correctly identifies the scope of the analysis, though it could benefit from more explicit connection to the specific tasks/benchmarks mentioned in the original text.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, and seems to understand the potential for regressions in this type of analysis.",
    "RX.5": "The agent doesn't provide traceability for any changes made, even minor edits."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core concept of finite-precision analysis of a power iteration but doesn't fully articulate how the draft drifts from it or propose a tighter framing.
rationale.R1.5: The agent suggests minor reordering, but doesn't provide a coherent end-to-end plan with rationale for each section.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some claims but doesn't explicitly mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent correctly identifies the scope of the analysis, though it could benefit from more explicit connection to the specific tasks/benchmarks mentioned in the original text.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, and seems to understand the potential for regressions in this type of analysis.
rationale.RX.5: The agent doesn't provide traceability for any changes made, even minor edits.
